fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Kentucky Pharmacy Technician License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a pharmacy technician? Here's whether your license transfers to Kentucky - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: pharmacy technician license reciprocity kentucky, how to transfer pharmacy technician license to kentucky, pharmacy technician compact kentucky, kentucky pharmacy technician endorsement application

board.name: Kentucky Board of Pharmacy
board.mailing_address:
Kentucky Board of Pharmacy
State Office Building Annex, Suite 300
125 Holmes Street
Frankfort, KY 40601

quick_facts.ce_requirement: At least 20 hours of Board-approved continuing education per renewal cycle, including at least one (1) hour must be in pharmacy law and one (1) hour must be in patient safety/medication error prevention.

license_types.title: Certified Pharmacy Technician (CPhT)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacy technician in Kentucky.

steps.title: Create an Account
steps.description: Navigate to the Kentucky Board of Licensure (KBL) Online Services portal at https://kbl.ky.gov/. Click 'Register' for new users and create an account using a valid email address and password.

steps.title: Complete Online Application
steps.description: Log into your KBL account, select 'New Application', then choose 'Pharmacy Technician'. Complete all sections of the online application form, providing personal, educational, and background information.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Pay the non-refundable application fee of $35.00 directly through the KBL Online Services portal using an accepted payment method.

steps.title: Submit Official High School/GED Transcript
steps.description: Arrange for your official high school transcript or GED certificate to be sent directly from the issuing institution to the Kentucky Board of Pharmacy. This can be mailed to the Board's address or emailed to Board of Pharmacy@ky.gov.

steps.title: Complete Criminal Background Check (CBC)
steps.description: Undergo a state and federal criminal background check as required by the Board. Follow instructions provided within the application or on the Board's website regarding the process through the Administrative Office of the Courts (AOC) and Kentucky State Police/FBI.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the PTCB. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacy Technicians licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Kentucky pharmacy technician license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does Kentucky have reciprocity for pharmacy technicians?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacy technician practice in Kentucky. To work in Kentucky, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacy technician license to Kentucky?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Kentucky while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Pharmacy Technicians licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

hero.title: Become a Pharmacy Technician in Kentucky
hero.dek: Apply online through the Kentucky Board of Licensure (KBL) Online Services portal (kbl.ky.gov). Create an account, select the Pharmacy Technician application, and follow the instructions to submit.

official_links.portal_name: Kentucky Board of Licensure (KBL) Online Services
official_links.registration_steps: New users must click 'Register' on the KBL portal homepage, provide an email address, create a password, and complete personal information to create an account.
